global.title: This is the new 18-in-1 electric vehicle you can build yourself
global.summary: If you’ve ever wished you could buy one electric vehicle that could evolve with your needs instead of replacing it every time your use case changes, a Canadian company thinks it has the answer. ENVO Drive Systems has unveiled its new Utility Personal Transporter (UPT), a modular electric vehicle pla

global.title: NEVI gets real in Illinois as first federally funded EV chargers go online
global.summary: The Illinois Department of Transportation (IDOT) cut the ribbon on the state’s first federally-funded EV charging station this week, after energizing new high-speed chargers at a Phillips 66 Mach 1 station in Casey, IL.

global.title: The new Hyundai Kona leaks with a tougher look and a surprise inside
global.summary: Hyundai skipped the typical mid-cycle refresh and instead gave the Kona a complete overhaul. The first image of it leaked, revealing a taller, SUV-like design.

global.title: Schneider Electric’s upgraded app-free EV charger now has NACS
global.summary: Schneider Electric has just given its Charge Pro commercial Level 2 EV charger a sweet upgrade that includes NACS support, app-free charging, and a quicker setup process.

global.title: BYD launches the Denza Z9 GT EV in Europe and the UK at over 3X the price
global.summary: BYD launched its luxury sub-brand Denza in Europe with a little help from James Bond himself. The Denza Z9 GT EV can recharge in as little as 5 minutes, drive nearly 400 miles on a single charge, and looks like something straight out of an action movie.

global.title: Massachusetts wants to pay EV drivers for their battery power
global.summary: Some Massachusetts EV owners will soon be able to earn incentives for sending electricity from their car batteries back to the grid when demand spikes.

global.title: Heybike Mars 2.0, ALPHA, Horizon e-bikes get up to $800 exclusive savings to new lows, Segway EVs up to 46% off, Aventon, more
global.summary: We’ve got an EV-focused edition of Green Deals for you today, starting with up to $800 exclusive savings you can score on Heybike’s Mars 2.0 Folding e-bike, ALPHA All-Terrain Mid-Drive e-bike, and Horizon Full-Suspension e-bike – all at new low prices starting from $799, after using our code at chec

global.title: Toyota warns it ‘cannot survive’ as the next-gen Corolla EV becomes its make-or-break
global.summary: The world’s best-selling car of all time is going electric. Toyota warned it “cannot survive” by sticking to its traditional methods as it pins its future on the next-generation Corolla EV.

global.title: Volvo’s new midsize electric SUV delivers more range than expected, with up to 330 miles
global.summary: Volvo is already calling it a game-changing electric SUV. The new 2027 EX60 now has an EPA-estimated driving range of up to 330 miles, making it the longest-range EV Volvo offers.

global.title: Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix 2026: Day 2 results and images
global.summary: The second day of racing at this year’s Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix concluded late last night, with the finalization of lap results.
